childhood.familyBackground: Born into a farming family in Zhejiang province. Self-made entrepreneur.
childhood.education: Limited formal education. Rose through factory work and business acumen.
childhood.educationKo: 정규 교육이 제한적. 공장 근무와 사업 감각으로 성장.
childhood.earlyLife: Grew up in rural Zhejiang during challenging economic times.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 경제적으로 어려운 시기에 저장성 시골에서 성장.

careerTimeline.event: Founded Rongsheng Petrochemical (now Hengli Petrochemical equivalent) in Zhejiang
Expanded into large-scale polyester and chemical fiber production
careerTimeline.eventKo: 대규모 폴리에스터 및 화학섬유 생산으로 확장

careerTimeline.event: Built major refining and petrochemical complex in Zhoushan, Zhejiang
careerTimeline.eventKo: 저장성 저우산에 대형 정유 및 석유화학 단지 건설

careerTimeline.event: Company became one of China's largest private petrochemical enterprises
careerTimeline.eventKo: 회사가 중국 최대 민간 석유화학 기업 중 하나로 성장

failures.description: Global oversupply in petrochemicals caused price pressure
failures.descriptionKo: 석유화학의 글로벌 공급과잉이 가격 압박 유발
failures.lesson: Vertical integration helps weather commodity price cycles
failures.lessonKo: 수직 통합이 원자재 가격 순환을 견디는 데 도움

quotes.text: Start small, dream big, and never stop working.
quotes.textKo: 작게 시작하고, 크게 꿈꾸고, 일하기를 멈추지 마라.

personalTraits.knownFor: Building one of China's largest private petrochemical empires from scratch
personalTraits.knownForKo: 무에서 중국 최대 민간 석유화학 제국 중 하나 구축
